caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue and white striped collared shirt and large black over-ear headphones, is speaking directly to a camera. She is positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and light-green curtains to her left. The name "Nancy Ramya" appears as white text in the bottom left corner of each scene. As the video progresses, she maintains a steady gaze forward, her mouth moving as she speaks. Her facial expressions shift slightly, with her lips parting and closing in a natural speaking motion. She remains centered in the frame throughout, with no other people or significant objects visible in the background except for the curtain and a glimpse of a neutral-colored surface behind her right shoulder.
